windows.embed_text_v2: intro title sequence with 'MARKET DAY' overlay text over rural farmland, gravel road, utility poles and blue sky; unrelated landscape b-roll, not candle making.
windows.summary_v2: A rural roadside intro montage with a burned-in 'MARKET DAY' title overlay; no candle-making activity is shown.

seconds_v2.desc: A drone or vehicle-side shot of a rural landscape with flat brown farm fields, a utility pole on the right, and bold white overlay text reading 'MARKET DAY' across the frame.
Continuing pan across the same rural roadside view, fields and utility lines visible, 'MARKET DAY' title text remains burned in.
Camera continues moving along the country road, farmland and a small distant farmhouse visible, large white 'MARKET DAY' overlay still on screen.
View now includes a road sign on the right and additional power lines on the left, fields and sky in the background, 'MARKET DAY' overlay persists.
Vehicle turns onto a gravel road heading toward the horizon with a one-way sign on the left and a utility pole on the right; the 'MARKET DAY' title text is still overlaid.
Side-window view of empty plowed fields with vapor trails crossing the blue sky, 'MARKET DAY' overlay text continues.
Continued lateral pan past brown fields with a few small farm buildings on the horizon, the white 'MARKET DAY' overlay still dominates the middle of the frame.
Similar landscape shot, fields and roadside greenery in foreground, distant farm structures, overlay text unchanged.
Final landscape frame of the intro: brown harvested fields, blue sky, faint roadside shadow of the moving vehicle, 'MARKET DAY' title text still burned in.
